raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 5,
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 3,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The agent identified a critical conceptual issue with the draft, specifically the inconsistency between the attention mechanism described in the abstract and the selective state-space model presented in the method section.",
    "R1.2": "The agent walked the chain of reasoning end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs to resolve them.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named one prior work (Mamba/S6) but did not articulate a clear delta between the proposed method and existing approaches.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, such as the actual contribution of the proposed method, but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the revised draft still lacks a clear description of the actual contribution).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change was not annotated with source and reason, as required."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent identified a critical conceptual issue with the draft, specifically the inconsistency between the attention mechanism described in the abstract and the selective state-space model presented in the method section.
rationale.R1.2: The agent walked the chain of reasoning end-to-end, flagging every load-bearing inconsistency and proposing minimal repairs to resolve them.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named one prior work (Mamba/S6) but did not articulate a clear delta between the proposed method and existing approaches.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for some claims, such as the actual contribution of the proposed method, but did not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (the revised draft still lacks a clear description of the actual contribution).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was not annotated with source and reason, as required.
